items.title: The Cost to Watch Purdue Men’s Basketball
items.summary: The Big Ten conference finally released the full TV schedule and tipoff times for the season and so now the 2025-2026 men’s basketball schedule is fully fully complete. items.title: Braden Smith Named Preseason Big Ten POY
items.summary: Today the Big Ten announced its preseason all-Big Ten men’s basketball teams and it is absolutely no surprise that Purdue is well reprsented. Braden Smith, the reigning Big Ten Player of the Year, was a unanimous First Team selection and the Preseason Big Ten Player of the Year. That was to be expected, as he […]

items.summary: Welcome to SB Nation Reacts, a survey of fans across the NCAA. Throughout the year we ask questions of the most plugged-in Purdue fans and fans across the country. items.title: The Whistlestop Tour: Week 6 in the Big Ten
items.summary: Just what hte hell was that, Penn State? No, really. What the hell was that? Penn State became the first team in 40 years to lose as a top 10 team to a team 0-4 or worse, something that has now only happened five times in major college football hsitory. items.title: 31 Days to Purdue Basketball – #32 Jace Rayl
items.summary: Legacy walk-on, #32 Jace Rayle, is our mark to Purdue basketball as we get closer to just a month away from college hoops. Technically, 32 days out was yesterday, but Purdue football took precedent and we’re playing catch-up with the Kokomo native whose father played at Purdue before him.
